name: ᛟ Othala
summary: Heritage, sacred land, ancestral pattern, rightful belonging
flowText: Othala draws a circle around what is yours to keep and steward. It speaks in the voice of grandmothers and soil: stand firm, remember whose ground you walk on, and tend the house so it outlives you. Claim your inheritance—then become a worthy ancestor to those who will cross this threshold after you.

overview.label: Essence
overview.value: Heritage, sacred land, ancestral pattern, rightful belonging
